stories.headline: India Short-Bond Rally Faces Risks From Cash Drain, Analysts Say
stories.summary: A blazing rally in India’s short-end bonds, driven by plans to attract foreign capital, may fizzle out because the central bank is expected to drain excess cash from the financial system, according to analysts.

stories.headline: Australian Beef Exports Face 55% China Tariff as Quota Reached

stories.headline: NZ’s Meat Shipments to US Surge, Lifting Total Exports to Monthly Record
stories.summary: New Zealand exports surged to a second straight monthly record in May, driven by meat shipments to the US and milk consignments, as farmers continue to benefit from strong demand and high commodity prices.

stories.headline: Goldman Says UK’s Sterling Now the Most Overvalued G10 Currency

stories.headline: S. Korean Producer Prices Rise Most Since 2022 on Energy Costs
stories.summary: South Korea’s producer prices rose in May at the fastest pace in nearly four years, as higher energy costs and a broad-based increase in industrial prices continued to filter through the economy.
